problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
